description: The Socioboard notification microservice is currently failing to send emails. Configure the SMTP settings in the configuration file at `/opt/socioboard/socioboard-api/notification/config/development.json` and restart the service. Use the following SMTP settings: host `smtp.brightwave-agency.com`, port `587`, TLS `true`, auth user `notifications@brightwave-agency.com`, password `BrightNotify2024!`, sender email `noreply@brightwave-agency.com`, and sender name `Socioboard Alerts`. Create a verification report at `/home/ga/notification_smtp_report.txt` containing the configured SMTP host and port, the sender email address, the service process status, and a timestamp of when the configuration was applied.
